title: Creator Zone 8pcs Play Clay Set - Colour Dough Modelling Kit, Easy to Carry, Perfect for Gifting, Crafting & Playing, DIY Kids Arts & Crafts Age 3+, Group Activities, Playdough Party Bag Fillers
features: Inspire Creative Play – This 8-piece playdough set invites children to explore, design, and experiment, encouraging confidence, storytelling, and limitless creativity through colourful hands-on play.

Empower Learning Through Play – Perfect as a play dough set for 3 year old and above or part of wider playdough sets, it helps children strengthen fine motor skills, focus, and imagination while enjoying artistic fun.

Versatile Creative Fun – Ideal for classrooms, family play, or group projects, this set adapts to themed crafts, seasonal activities like easter playdough, or even as cheerful playdough party bag fillers.

Reusable & Innovative – The clay is soft and pliable, designed for repeated use. Each session offers new opportunities to shape, refine, and reimagine, empowering children to grow in skill and expression.

Vibrant Colour Selection – The set includes 2pcs each of blue, yellow, green, and red. This bright palette encourages mixing, matching, and experimenting, inspiring exciting designs in every play session.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Add Colour, Sparkle & Fun to Every Arts & Crafts Project! 8pcs Play Dough Set Add To Basket 40pk Wax Crayons Add To Basket Glitter Crafting Kit Add To Basket 12pk Glitter Glue Pens Add To Basket 10pk Fabric Paint Pens Add To Basket 2pk Unicorn Glasses Set Add To Basket 600pk Star Sequins Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 4.7 out of 5 stars 4 4.0 out of 5 stars 5 4.1 out of 5 stars 10 3.2 out of 5 stars 8 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £6.49 £ 6 . 49 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Solid Colour ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ For Theme Party ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Encourages Creativity ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Great for Group Activities ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What colours are included in the 8pcs Play Clay Set? The set includes 2 pieces each of blue, yellow, green, and red. These bright shades encourage mixing, matching, and imaginative creations during every play session. Is this playdough set suitable for younger children? Yes, it is designed as a play dough set for 3 year old and above. It’s also great for play dough sets for kids 4-5, helping little ones develop motor skills while having fun. Can this clay be reused multiple times? Absolutely. The clay is soft and pliable, allowing it to be shaped, rolled, and rebuilt repeatedly. Each use inspires children to refine skills and reimagine their creations. Where can this playdough set be used? It’s versatile for classrooms, home play, or group activities. Ideal for themed projects, seasonal crafts like easter playdough, or even as creative playdough party bag fillers at birthdays. Does this set work as a travel play option? Yes, the compact size makes it an excellent travel playdough set. Easy to carry, it keeps children entertained and inspired on holidays, trips, or while out and about.
